chapter_title.en: Chapter 15 – The sneezing and the Naming (of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/559)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/559)
text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) تَصْدِيقُ الْحَدِيثِ عِنْدَ الْعُطَاسِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Al Nowfaly, from Al Sakuny,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘is sneezing is a sign of the truthfulness (of a speaker)’.
en.sarwar: 24. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from al-Nawfali from al-Sakuni from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: ‘‘The Messenger of Allah has said, ‘Sneezing is a sign of truthfulness.’”
